search-options.heading: Search Options
search-options.open-new-tab: Open result links in new tab
search-options.open-new-tab-aria: Open result links in new tab

install.heading: Install app
install.desc: Add degoog to your home screen. If your browser did not show the install prompt, use this to try again.

server.streaming-desc: Load results progressively as each engine responds instead of waiting for all engines to finish. This is an experimental feature.
server.languages-desc: Change the search languages in the search options dropdown. When disabled, all ~90 built-in languages are shown.
server.proxy-desc: Use proxies for server-side search requests. One URL per line; requests rotate through the list.
server.rate-limit-desc: Limit requests per IP to protect the instance and upstream engines.
server.rate-limit-defaults: Defaults: 15 requests per 20s, 150 per 10 min per IP.
server.domain-block-desc: Hide search results from specific domains. One domain per line. Subdomains are included automatically. Wrap a line in /slashes/ for regex.
server.domain-block-regex-help: Regex entries must be wrapped in /slashes/ and use JavaScript RegExp syntax (no flags). They are matched against the URL hostname only (not the full URL). Example: /(^|\\.)instagram\\.com$/ blocks instagram.com and all subdomains; /^www\\.instagram\\.com$/ blocks only www.instagram.com.
server.domain-replace-desc: Replace domains in search result URLs. Use the format: source.com -> target.com (one per line). Subdomains are matched automatically, and the path is preserved.

proxy-test.not-enabled: Proxy is not enabled. Enable it and save before testing.
proxy-test.ip-unreachable: Could not reach IP check service. Check your network connection.
proxy-test.unreachable-hint: The proxy server could not be contacted. Check your proxy URL and that the proxy is running.
proxy-test.match-title: IPs match — proxy may not be working.
proxy-test.match-hint: Both routes returned the same IP. The proxy might not be changing your exit IP.
proxy-test.server-error: Server returned {status}. Make sure you are authenticated.

gate.desc: Enter the password to access settings.
gate.network-error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

store.desc: Add a git repository URL to browse and install plugins, themes, engines, and transports. Set repo-image in the repo’s package.json to show an image next to the URL.
store.empty-repos: No repositories added. Add a git repository URL to browse its plugins, themes, engines, and transports.
store.install-plugin-message: This plugin will run code on your server. Only install from sources you trust. Continue?
store.remove-repo-message: Remove this repository? You must uninstall any installed items first.

natural-language.label: Natural language
natural-language.description: When on, typing the trigger or phrase without ! runs the command and shows search results below.

score.label: Score
score.description: Result ranking multiplier for this engine. Higher values favour its results.

outgoing-transport.label: Outgoing HTTP client
outgoing-transport.description: The outgoing HTTP client to use for this engine.

slot-position.label: Position
slot-position.description: Where the slot content appears on the page.
